sessions.summary: Troubleshoot Vibe transcription app sona crash during Hebrew model loading
accomplishments: Diagnosed sona process crash in Vibe 3.0.19 — server starts but dies during model load of ggml-ivrit-v2-d3-e3.bin
Verified model file integrity (2.9GB, correct size) and available RAM (11GB free of 64GB)
Read Vibe source code (sona.rs) to confirm race condition: load_model() retry loop detects dead process at line 222
Researched alternative Hebrew transcription tools (Buzz, whisper.cpp CLI, OpenAI API)
Issue resolved itself — Vibe successfully loaded model and transcription reached 65%

sessions.summary: Fix external schema validation for businessAreas and document double validation flow
accomplishments: Fixed businessAreas type from array to object in internal schema (v2.2.3, commit f9b7af5)
Added businessAreas to external schemaChange.json which had additionalProperties:false (v2.2.4, commit 016643f)
Documented double validation flow (internal + external) in README with ASCII diagram (commit 37f4f87)
Saved double validation knowledge to project memory MEMORY.md
Verified all changes working on staging
nextSteps: Completed - all schema changes verified on staging

sessions.summary: Add localStorage persistence and fix drag-drop column targeting
accomplishments: Added localStorage save/load to DataStore so browser task edits survive page refresh without GitHub token
Implemented merge strategy: localStorage wins when updatedAt is newer than fetched data
Fixed drag-drop to work on full column area by adding min-height and flex:1 to .column-cards CSS
Committed and pushed 7cdbab5
nextSteps: Test drag-drop on live site after GitHub Pages deploy
Verify localStorage persistence across hard refresh
